description: Booking or jail mugshot photograph with no graphic design or on-image text. It shows the head and shoulders of an older man with gray hair, a gray and white mustache and goatee, and weathered features, wearing an orange jail uniform over a gray shirt, photographed straight-on against a neutral gray detention-facility wall. The accompanying tweet identifies him as Jesus Clemente Lara-Mireles, convicted of rape of a child, a Mexican citizen removed by ICE El Paso. There is no readable on-image text.
